# init(mixerDefinition:format:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ PHASE ](/documentation/phase)

- [ PHASEPullStreamNodeDefinition ](/documentation/phase/phasepullstreamnodedefinition)

- [ init(mixerDefinition:format:) ](/documentation/phase/phasepullstreamnodedefinition/init(mixerdefinition:format:))

- [ PHASEPullStreamNodeDefinition ](/documentation/phase/phasepullstreamnodedefinition)

-  init(mixerDefinition:format:) 

Initializer# init(mixerDefinition:format:)

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+tvOS 18.0+visionOS 2.0+

```
init(
    mixerDefinition: PHASEMixerDefinition,
    format: AVAudioFormat
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/phase/phasepullstreamnodedefinition/init(mixerdefinition:format:)#parameters)

`mixerDefinition`The mixer definition this stream will be assigned to

`format`The AVAudioFormat object that will define the attributes of the audio this node will accept. Only Core Audio’s standard deinterleaved 32-bit floating-point formats are supported.

## [Return Value](/documentation/phase/phasepullstreamnodedefinition/init(mixerdefinition:format:)#return-value)

A new PHASEPullStreamNodeDefinition object

## [Discussion](/documentation/phase/phasepullstreamnodedefinition/init(mixerdefinition:format:)#discussion)

Create a pull stream node definition
